name: Global Shop Solutions ERP API
what_it_does: Global Shop Solutions REST API for job shop and make-to-order manufacturing ERP. Enables AI agents to manage job order creation and scheduling for custom manufacturing execution, handle shop floor routing and work center management for production operations, access real-time WIP tracking and job costing for manufacturing financial management, retrieve inventory and raw material management for supply chain operations, manage customer quote-to-cash workflow for order fulfillment, handle purchasing and vendor management for procurement automation, access labor and time tracking data for workforce management, retrieve quality control and inspection data for manufacturing quality, manage shipping and delivery tracking for distribution, and integrate shop floor data with CRM and MES platforms.
use_cases: Managing job orders from custom manufacturing agents
Tracking shop floor WIP from production monitoring agents
Generating customer quotes from sales automation agents
Monitoring inventory from supply chain agents
not_for: Process manufacturing without discrete job shop focus
High-volume repetitive manufacturing without custom/job shop workflow
Enterprise-scale manufacturers requiring SAP or Oracle capabilities
best_when: A job shop or make-to-order manufacturer using Global Shop Solutions wants AI agents to automate job scheduling, shop floor tracking, customer quoting, inventory management, and job costing.
avoid_when: INTEGRATION RISK: Global Shop Solutions ERP has limited public API documentation — integration requires working closely with vendor professional services. On-premises deployment model creates network access challenges for cloud-based AI agents. API coverage may not include all manufacturing modules requiring custom development.

auth.notes: Global Shop Solutions uses API key authentication. No OAuth 2.0. Primarily on-premises with cloud option. The Woodlands, Texas HQ. Private (independent). Founded 1976. One of the longest-standing job shop ERP vendors. 3,000+ customers primarily in custom and contract manufacturing. Strong in aerospace job shops, metal fabrication, and custom machining. Competes with Epicor JobScope, Infor SyteLine, and JobBOSS for job shop manufacturing ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — perpetual or subscription license
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user license or annual subscription; implementation services
pricing.notes: The Woodlands, Texas. Founded 1976. Private (independent). 3,000+ customers. Job shop and make-to-order manufacturing focus. Cloud and on-premises. Competes with Epicor JobScope, Infor Visual, and E2 SHOP for custom manufacturing ERP.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits not publicly documented; on-premises deployment dependent

known_agent_gotchas: INTEGRATION RISK: Limited public API documentation — integration typically requires Global Shop professional services engagement; API surface is not self-service
On-premises deployment — most installations are on-premises; cloud agent connectivity requires VPN or secure tunnel configuration
No webhooks — polling required for event-driven integrations; no native event notification
Small vendor maturity — independent private company with limited developer ecosystem; API tooling and documentation trail larger ERP vendors significantly
Version update cadence — annual major releases; API changes may require significant re-testing after ERP version upgrades
agent_readiness.security_notes: Job shop ERP. API key auth. US. Manufacturing job order and financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Job shop ERP. API key. US. Manufacturing and job cost data.
